languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, с вами желает связаться один из специалистов Сектора Бионика. Перевожу на входящую вокс-трансляцию с соответствующей палубы".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, с вами желает связаться один из Хирургеонов Секундарис Сектора Бионика. Перевожу на входящую вокс-трансляцию с медицинской палубы"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, с вами желает связаться один из специалистов Сектора Бионика. Перевожу на входящую вокс-трансляцию с соответствующей палубы".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."
"Lord Captain, a Chirurgeon Secundaris from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."
"Lord Captain, a Chirurgeon Secundaris from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."
"Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

languages.text: 「艦長、セクター・ビオニカの外科医セカンドリーが話したいそうです。対応デッキからの受信音声に転送します。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a Chirurgeon Secundaris from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'daki uzmanlarımızdan biri sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Sizi ilgili güverteden gelen voks iletimine aktarıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'daki uzmanlarımızdan biri sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Sizi ilgili güverteden gelen voks iletimine aktarıyorum."

languages.text: “舰长大人，仿生区的一位专家请求与您通话。正在转接该甲板传来的音阵信号。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，仿生区的一位专家请求与您通话。正在转接该甲板传来的音阵信号。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, einer unserer Experten aus dem Sektor Bionica will Euch sprechen. Leite eine eingehende Vox-Übertragung des entsprechenden Decks weiter."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, einer unserer Experten aus dem Sektor Bionica will Euch sprechen. Leite eine eingehende Vox-Übertragung des entsprechenden Decks weiter."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, l'un de nos experts du secteur Bionica souhaite vous parler. Transfert de la transmission-vox en provenance du pont correspondant. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, l'un de nos experts du secteur Bionica souhaite vous parler. Transfert de la transmission-vox en provenance du pont correspondant. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, uno de nuestros expertos del Sector Bionica quiere hablar con usted. Le conecto la transmisión de voco de la cubierta correspondiente».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, uno de nuestros expertos del Sector Bionica quiere hablar con usted. Le conecto la transmisión de voco de la cubierta correspondiente».
